'''Tom Palmer''' (d. [[August 8]], [[2022]]<ref name="Death" />) was a comic-book artist and worked on many [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] comics. His work is included in ''[[Star Wars: Luke Skywalker, Last Hope for the Galaxy]]''.

His main area of expertise was [[Wikipedia:inker|inking]], and he was the main inker on Marvel's ''Star Wars'' series between [[1981]] and [[1985]]. Before and after his contributions to ''Star Wars'', he was the titular inker for the Marvel comic series [[Wikipedia:The Tomb of Dracula|''The Tomb of Dracula'']] ([[1973]] to [[1979]]) and [[Wikipedia:The Avengers (comic book)|''The Avengers'']] (1985 to [[1996]]), among many others.

In [[2017]], he returned to the franchise as an illustrator for the young-readers title ''[[The Rise of a Hero]]''.
